name: Podia Creator Platform API
what_it_does: Podia API for all-in-one creator platform management. Podia combines online courses, digital downloads, memberships, webinars, and email marketing in a single platform. API enables access to customer data, product sales, and course enrollment information.
use_cases: Querying Podia customer and sales data from creator business reporting agents
Retrieving course enrollment and completion metrics from learning analytics agents
Syncing Podia customer data with external CRM tools from marketing agents
Monitoring membership revenue and churn from subscription analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise LMS with compliance requirements (Podia is creator-focused)
High-volume product catalogs (Podia optimized for creators, not retailers)
best_when: A creator using Podia's all-in-one platform wants AI agents to query business metrics, customer data, and product performance across courses, memberships, and downloads.
avoid_when: Podia's API access is limited and not publicly documented for all features. Verify API capabilities for your specific use case before building integrations.

auth.notes: Podia API key authentication. Contact Podia for API access — not publicly self-serve. Limited developer documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Podia free tier limited; API access with paid plans ($39-$89/mo)
pricing.notes: Podia subscription required. API access documentation is limited — contact Podia support.

known_agent_gotchas: API access not publicly documented — must contact Podia for access
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Limited API coverage — not all Podia features accessible via API
Customer and enrollment data includes personal information
Emerging platform API with potentially unstable interfaces
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer data including course enrollment and purchase records. HTTPS enforced. Limited public documentation. Contact Podia for API details.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer purchase and enrollment data. Limited public security documentation. HTTPS enforced.
